title: I tested phones that shouldn’t EXIST
key_points:
I had no idea that smartphones like this
existed. And I've managed to secure nine
phones just like this. With each one
possessing an increasingly bizarre
capability that you probably won't see
coming. So, let's test them and rank
them from S. I want every future phone
to be like them to F. Not a bad
showing from the weird and wonderful. Actually more wonderful than weird
